prompt: A full-body portrait of a person standing in a narrow wet cobblestone alleyway at night. The person is wearing a dark jacket and dark trousers, with one hand resting against the rough, textured wall on the left and the other hand casually tucked into their pocket. Their face is completely obscured by a large yellow smiling emoji with blushing cheeks. The scene is illuminated by a single vintage street lamp mounted on the right wall, casting warm yellow light that reflects beautifully off the wet paving stones, creating deep, moody shadows. In the background, a small illuminated sign reads "三条小路". The artwork is a modern digital illustration with high contrast lighting and subtle shin-hanga influences, featuring a red square seal in the bottom right corner with the text "新版画" and a blank white vertical signature box with a tiny red seal in the bottom left.
